title: Retatrutide, a GIP, GLP-1 and glucagon receptor agonist, for people with type 2 diabetes: a randomised, double-blind, placebo and active-controlled, parallel-group phase 2 trial
study_design: phase 2 randomised double-blind placebo- and active-controlled trial
key_results: Retatrutide produced clinically meaningful HbA1c and bodyweight reductions in the studied population.
safety_findings: Gastrointestinal events were the most frequently reported adverse events.
limitations: Phase 2 duration and selected trial population limit long-term and general-population inference.
investigational_status_notice: Retatrutide remains investigational and is not approved for public use.
